posts.focus: Telegram becomes an agent entry point only when context, permissions, action, observation, and human decision are designed as one loop.
posts.behavioral_transition: From adding a bot to a messenger to mapping an explicit six-stage workflow with a human gate.
posts.tension: Convenient access and accumulated context raise usefulness and permission risk together.
posts.coverage_delta: A chronology and decision-rights model join three already-published stages, but a fresh walkthrough is still absent.

cta.text: Возьмите один процесс, который уже начинается в мессенджере, и нарисуйте шесть ячеек: запрос → контекст → разрешение → действие → проверка → результат. Отдельно отметьте шаг, где решение остаётся за вами.

posts.format_change_reason: None; retained the radar's gconf_field_note format.

posts.focus: Compare short and long formats by the behavior they unlock and retain, not by the attractiveness of first artifacts.
posts.behavioral_transition: From celebrating first outputs to measuring second use, manual remainder, failure, and support needs.
posts.tension: A fast artifact can remove the starting barrier without proving that a workflow survives after the event.
posts.coverage_delta: A clearly limited activation-versus-practice hypothesis and standardized follow-up are added to already-published cases.

cta.text: Отправьте участникам обоих форматов одинаковый follow-up: использовали ли вы результат второй раз, что осталось ручным, где он сломался и какая помощь понадобилась?

posts.format_change_reason: None; retained the radar's gconf_field_note format.

unresolved_items: The Telegram control-plane draft needs a new safe end-to-end workflow artifact, permission boundary, and failure edge before publication.
The format time-horizon draft needs standardized participant follow-up before its comparative hypothesis can be strengthened or published as a field conclusion.
